finding_results.notes: Recast Malik's boundary-setting around same-day facts already on the page: the borrowed aunt's car, delayed job, gas receipt, waiting in the lot, packed trunk, missed calls, and Tiana never asking him to keep driving north. Removed the abstract diagnostic line about whose life gets interrupted.
finding_results.summary: Malik's confrontation now stays in his dry, practical register and grounds the limit in concrete costs from this day instead of polished thematic language.

summary: Revised the parking-lot confrontation so Malik's love and limit land through observable logistics and pressure rather than generalized thesis language.
